title: Avoid using @Async in @Configuration classes in Spring Boot
description: The use of the @Async annotation on methods declared within a @Configuration class in Spring Boot can lead to unexpected behavior. Spring does not proxy @Configuration classes for asynchronous execution, so methods annotated with @Async in these classes will not be executed asynchronously as intended.
recommendation: Do not annotate methods with @Async inside @Configuration classes. If asynchronous execution is required, move the method to a separate @Component or @Service class.
impact: Methods intended to run asynchronously may execute synchronously, leading to performance issues or incorrect application behavior.

checks.message: Do not annotate methods with @Async inside @Configuration classes. If asynchronous execution is required, move the method to a separate @Component or @Service class.
